name: project-scaffolder
description: Automatically generate a complete project knowledge base from a brief — CLAUDE.md, Karpathy-style wiki (21+ pages), vertical skills, guardrails, handoff protocol, and implementation plans. One brief in, entire project structure out. Features 3 interaction modes (Normal/Autopilot/Autonomous) and automatic Caveman token optimization (~65% savings).
